――クルルが迷子の犬を保護してからしばらくあと。: —Some time after Kururu took in the lost dog.
司令官、少し確認したいことがあるんですが……: Commander, there's something I'd like to confirm...
クルルちゃんが最近探索に参加してくれないんです。<br>何かあったんですか？ ケ:
Kururu hasn't been joining us on exploration missions lately. Did
something happen? Is she hurt or sick?
セイカリオンの収集も全然進んでいないですし、<br>このままじゃ前線基地の復旧も:
And we haven't made any progress on Seikarion collection at all. At
this rate, restoring the Frontline Base is going to take even longer.
なるほど。それは問題だな。<br>やはり、クルルの嗅覚が必要か……:
I see. That is a problem. As I thought, we need Kururu's sense of
smell...
はい。クルルちゃんに期待してましたから。<br>できれば探索には協力してほしいと:
Yes. We were counting on Kururu. If possible, we'd like her to help
with the explorations.
分かった。<br>今からクルルの様子を見に行ってくるか。: Got it. I'll go check on Kururu now.
わたしも心配なのでついていきます！<br>クルルちゃん、お元気ならいいんですけど: I'll come too, I'm worried! I hope she's doing okay...
でしたらクルルちゃん、どうして探索に来てくれないんでしょう？<br>何かあったん:
Then, Kururu, why haven't you been joining us on explorations? Did
something happen?
探索？ 大穴のー？ <br>あ、ごめんね。ちょっとハチミツを放っておけなくて……:
Exploration? The Abyss? Ah, sorry. I couldn't leave Hachimitsu
alone...
鳴き声と共に、部屋のベッドからむくりと子犬が起き上がるのが見えた。<br>小さな:
At the sound, a puppy slowly sat up from the bed in the room. Its
small leg was wrapped in a white bandage.
可愛い！ ワンちゃん飼ってるんですかぁ！？: How cute! Are you keeping a puppy?
まだ足を引きずってる様子だな。: The puppy is still limping, huh.
うん、でも少しずつ歩けるようになったし<br>もうすぐいっぱい走れるようになると:
Yeah, but he's starting to walk a little. I think he'll be running around
soon!
子犬は怪我をした脚を気にしたように小さく鳴き、 <br>クルルの腕にそっと鼻先を:
The puppy whimpered softly, as if worried about its injured leg, and
gently pressed its nose against Kururu's arm.
だいじょうぶだよ、ハチミツはクルルの家族だから。<br>治るまでちゃんと面倒見る:
It's okay, Hachimitsu is my family now. I'll take good care of you until
you're all better!
そういえばクルルちゃん、食堂でハチミツたっぷりのパン、<br>美味しそうに食べて:
Come to think of it, Kururu, I saw you eating bread with lots of honey
in the cafeteria. You looked like you were really enjoying it.
えっと……、<br>つまりクルルちゃんはこのワンちゃんの世話で手一杯ってことです:
Um... so that means Kururu's hands are full taking care of this puppy,
right?
子犬を抱きしめて微笑むクルル。 <br><user>とアリシアは目を合わせて頷き:
Kururu hugged the puppy and smiled. The Commander and Alicia
exchanged glances and nodded.
クルルの家族がケガで療養中なんだ。<br>しばらくはそっとしておこう。:
Kururu's family member is injured and recuperating. Let's give them
some space for now.
分かりました。<br>クルルちゃん、何かあれば声をかけてください、皆さん力になり:
Understood. Kururu, if you need anything, please let us know.
Everyone here will help.
ははは、気にするなって言っておいてくれ。: Ahaha, tell him not to worry about it.
司令官。前線基地の壁の復旧は進んではいるのですが、<br>突貫工事のため、強度に:
Commander. The restoration of the Frontline Base's walls is
progressing, but since it was a rush job, I'm worried about the durability...
このまま、またこのあいだくらいの厄災に襲撃されてしまったら、<br>さすがに耐え:
If we were attacked by a calamity like the last one again, I doubt we
could withstand it...
なるほどな。やはり、セイカリオンが大量に必要か。: I see. So we really do need a lot of Seikarion after all.
はい。でもあの階層の調査も進んでおらず、<br>セイカリオンはまだ少量しか収集で:
Yes. But the survey of that layer hasn't progressed, so we've only
been able to collect a small amount of Seikarion...
やはりクルルが頼みの綱か。: So we're counting on Kururu after all.
はい。<br>でも、ハチミツちゃんが元気になるまでは無理ですよね……？: Yes. But it's no use until Hachimitsu is better, right?
そうだな。<br>クルルのことを信じて待とう。: Yeah. Let's trust Kururu and wait.
……司令官。<br>分かりました、わたしもクルルちゃんを信じます。: ...Commander. I understand. I'll trust Kururu too.
と、その時、ドドドドド、と勢いよく走る音が聞こえてくる。<br>そして大きな音が:
Just then, the sound of hurried footsteps approached the command
room door—
どーん！ と司令室のドアが開かれた。: Bam! The command room door burst open.
クルル！？ <br>ど、どうしたいきなり！？: Kururu! W-What's with the sudden rush?!
聞いて聞いて、ご主人さま！<br>ハチミツ、すっごくかしこいの！: Listen, listen, Master! Hachimitsu is really, really smart!
おっ！ 包帯も取れたな。<br>もう元気に歩けるようになったのか？: Oh! The bandages are off too. So he can walk well now?
うん！ それでね！<br>ハチミツ、あの石がいっぱいある場所、知ってるって！:
Yeah! And you know what! Hachimitsu knows where there's loads of
that stone!
あの石って、まさかセイカリオンのことですか！？: That stone, you don't mean Seikarion, do you?!
というかクルル、犬と話せるのか！？: Wait, Kururu, you can talk to dogs?!
もちろんだよ～！<br>森で仲間たちといっぱいお話ししてたもん！: Of course! I used to talk with my forest friends all the time!
よしアリシア！ 捜索隊を再編成だ！ <br>すぐにセイカリオン捜索に向かうぞ！:
Alright, Alicia! Reform the search party! We're heading out to find
Seikarion immediately!
ハチミツがこっちだって言ってる！<br>いっそげー！: Hachimitsu says it's this way! Hurry!
はぁ……構いませんけどねえ。 <br>ここは前にも探索したところで、もう何もない:
*sigh*... I don't mind, but... We've already searched this area before. I
think there's nothing there, you know?
こんな場所に鉱脈があるんでしょうか……: I wonder if there really is a vein in a place like this...
まぁ、ここはクルルとハチミツを信じよう。<br>俺たちにはない感性の持ち主だから:
Well, let's trust Kururu and Hachimitsu. They have instincts we don't,
after all.
どうだ、クルル。 <br>まだ遠いのか？: How is it, Kururu? Is it still far?
うーん、もう少し……。 <br>あっ！ こっちだって！: Hmm, a little more... Ah! It's this way!
ハチミツは岩壁の下の、人が１人やっと通れるような隙間へ滑り込んでいく。<br>一:
Hachimitsu slipped into a gap beneath the rock wall just barely wide
enough for one person to squeeze through, and the group followed.
隙間を抜けた先、目の前に広がる光景に、誰もが言葉を失った。<br>洞窟の壁一面が:
Everyone was speechless after passing through the gap: the entire
cave wall was a mineral vein glowing mysteriously.
これは――セイカリオンの鉱脈！？<br>すごいぞ、これだけあれば……！: This is—a Seikarion vein! Amazing, with this much...!
こ、こんな隙間の先にこれだけの大量のセイカリオンがあるなんて……: T-to think there was this much Seikarion in a crevice like this...!
なるほど、風が逆に吹いている。<br>それで匂いにも気付けなかったのね。:
I see, the wind is blowing in the opposite direction. That's why we
didn't notice the scent.
よーし、よくやったぞ、クルル！ ハチミツ！<br>大手柄だ！: Alright, great work, Kururu! Hachimitsu! That's a huge achievement!
えへへ やったやった！ <br>さすがハチミツ～: Ehehe! We did it, we did it! That's my Hachimitsu!
ここまでの地図をまとめて採掘部隊の手配をするぞ。 <br>一刻も早く基地へ届けな:
I'll compile a map of the route and arrange for a mining team. We
need to get this back to base ASAP.
ふふ～！ <br>ハチミツはかしこいし、すごいんだよ～！: Fufu! Hachimitsu is smart and amazing, you know!
クルルが頬ずりをしようとしたその時、ハチミツは身を震わせると、<br>遠くの岩陰:
Just as Kururu moved to nuzzle Hachimitsu, the puppy trembled and
let out a small cry toward a distant rock shadow.
ハチミツの視線の先。<br>そこには岩陰に隠れるように、輝く１対の瞳がこちらを睨:
In the direction of Hachimitsu's gaze, hidden in the shadow of the
rocks, a pair of glowing eyes glared back at them.
慌てて戦闘態勢を取る兵士たち。 <br>だが、クルルは慌てて彼らの前に立ちふさが:
The soldiers hurriedly prepared for battle. But Kururu rushed to
stand in their way.
ううん、違うよ！ <br>みんな武器をしまってっ！: No, that's not it! Everyone, put your weapons away!
ハチミツが岩陰に飛び出していく。 <br>それに応えるように、ハチミツとよく似た:
Hachimitsu dashed out towards the shadow of the rocks. As if
responding, a large dog that looked very similar to Hachimitsu appeared.
母犬が来ていたのか……: So the mother dog was here...
きっとママもハチミツのこと探してたんだと思う。<br>だからハチミツのニオイが残:
I bet mama was looking for Hachimitsu too. That's why she waited
here, where Hachimitsu's scent lingered.
ハチミツは母犬の周りをぐるぐるとまわる。<br>母犬はハチミツの脚をくんくんと匂:
Hachimitsu circled around its mother. The mother dog sniffed at
Hachimitsu's legs and then sat down, looking relieved.
母親と再会できたんだもんな。: The puppy got to reunite with its mother, after all.
母犬の隣に座ったハチミツは、 <br>戸惑ったようにクルルと母犬に視線をさまよわ:
Hachimitsu sat down next to its mother, then glanced hesitantly
between Kururu and its mother.
……ハチミツ、いいんだよ。<br>ママと一緒に行って。: ...Hachimitsu, it's okay. Go with your mama.
良かったね。<br>もう迷子なっちゃダメだよ！: I'm glad! Don't get lost again!
元気な吠え声をあげて、ハチミツと母犬は穴の奥へと姿を消す。<br>クルルはじっと:
With a lively bark, Hachimitsu and the mother dog vanished into the
depths of the cave. Kururu stared intently at their backs.
……うん！<br>ハチミツにとっては ママと一緒が何より幸せだから……: ...Yeah! Being with Mama makes Hachimitsu the happiest...
（クルルにとってはやっとできた家族なのにな。<br>森を離れて、基地でも一緒にい:
(For Kururu, this was finally a family she had found... even though it
was a companion who could have stayed with her at the base.)
……本当は寂しいんだろ。<br>泣きたいときには我慢しなくたっていいんだぞ。:
...You're really sad, aren't you? You don't have to hold it in if you
want to cry.
クルルは<user>の、<br>そして兵士たちを見つめて、本当に幸せそうに微笑ん:
Kururu looked at the Commander and then at the soldiers, smiling
with genuine happiness.
クルルには、ご主人さまや、みんなが家族だもん！: Master and everyone are my family!
――そうだな。<br>基地のみんながお前の家族だ。: —That's right. Everyone at the base is your family.
えへへ……ずっと一緒だよ、ご主人さま♪: Ehehe... we'll be together forever, Master!♪
クルルのその屈託のない自然な笑顔に嘘はなかった。: There was no lie in Kururu's carefree, natural smile.
森を離れ、独りぼっちだった彼女にとって、この前線基地こそが、<br>新しい『家』:
For her, who had left the forest and been all alone, this Frontline
Base was her new home, and the companions here were her new family.
